{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125925D4E39828AA5048440E5F"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592111057386996505","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"了解历史，了解了多尔衮，继续听读下去。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767680755,"group_id":"7575953582957005849","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3pkucGBDwfJGTt2qxbuMYE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"532598021963053","user_name":"爱吃豆花饭的天魔皇子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"532598021963053","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575953582957005849","book_info":{"abstract":"他是后金汗王努尔哈赤的第十四子，少年时目睹萨尔浒战场的硝烟，见证父汗一统女真的雄心；他是皇太极麾下的墨尔根戴青，率八旗铁骑横扫蒙古察哈尔，攻克辽东旅顺，以军事天赋崭露头角；他是顺治朝的摄政王，在权力漩涡中力挽狂澜，借山海关之战定鼎中原，一手撑起大清入主关内的基业 —— 他，就是爱新觉罗・多尔衮，一位被命运推着走向巅峰，又因权力纠葛身后蒙冤的铁血权臣。
从赫图阿拉的降生啼哭，到母妃阿巴亥殉葬时的隐忍沉默；从执掌正白旗的意气风发，到松锦之战的运筹帷幄；从皇太极病逝后皇位之争的折中抉择，到率清军入关、迎顺治帝定都北京的惊天壮举，多尔衮的一生，始终与大清开国的历史齿轮紧密咬合。他既是打破明蒙对峙格局的军事奇才，用铁骑踏平中原抵抗的开拓者，也是封建皇权游戏中的参与者 —— 他凭权力实现王朝跃迁，却也因权力巅峰的争议，在死后遭遇削爵抄家的厄运，直到百年后才被乾隆帝平反，恢复应有的历史地位。
本书还原多尔衮的传奇人生，剖析他在汗位之争、摄政理政、民族政策中的挣扎与抉择，最终揭开封建皇权下，功臣 “成也权力、困也权力” 的宿命真相，让读者在波澜壮阔的明末清初历史中，读懂一个真实、立体的多尔衮。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6a8a5f8c87cbd415fd37f019c9af5d19","author":"吉祥如意北京","author_id":"","book_id":"7575953582957005849","book_name":"多尔衮：铁马金戈定大清","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#885830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1043人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":502,"name":"宫廷侯爵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=502&name=宫廷侯爵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7575958997841232409","read_count":"1043","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"476204"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"200","tags":"历史古代,历史,宫廷侯爵,清朝,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o92411c697158c055e82d5b38e9ac17cf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253165&x-signature=mVljfm9joRa7N4iJqNOcet0tBqE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108952275312","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125925D4E39828AA5048440E5F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3829,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7653,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":318},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7599106906008208152","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉是人民子弟兵进城了[笑][笑][偷笑][偷笑][偷笑]。这么好的将士和政权还需要反抗吗？如果李自成的部队一直靠抢劫，能形成巨大战力推翻明朝政权？能在北京生存称帝？😂😂😂这本书是满族人写的吧，不过文笔还行，也很辛苦。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769309019,"group_id":"7575953582957005849","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"553804056506447"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7575953582957005849","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"287"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读35小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":101651,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":126630,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7595142747571176216","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书写客观，内容丰富，值得阅读"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768386191,"group_id":"7575953582957005849","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2S2u4cXSyPOXVXpTsgCjLE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614448&x-signature=77B3F2V9HxLK4vsnQuBSstH5PAo%3D","user_id":"553804056506447","user_name":"仙雅楼的离境"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"553804056506447","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"75
